content:
C/O: Pt came for filling appt. 



I/O: 

22 - large caries on DO, invovled pulp, TTP++, no tender on palpation, no swelling noted.

OH moderate, calculus + 

Dental caries 15M,13D,45D, 14DO 

Cervical abrasions 26

Retained root 17,28

Grossly decayed 48 



Plan: 

F 14DO

KIV RCT/XLA 22

F 15M,13D

XLA 45 (for denture), 17,28  

Suggested valplast to replace 44,45,46 (RM950) 



Mx: 

Examination done. 

F 14DO done with CR A3. 

Advised TCA for other treatments prior to denture. 

Pt would like to consider first.
